column4: Felt strong on the heavy lower session, squat moving well.
Poor sleep midweek, heavy workload; caffeine cut helped by Friday.
Interval session felt easier than last week at the same pace.
Weekend cravings higher than usual, kept snacking mostly on plan.
Added a mobility block after the functional circuit.
Shoulder slightly tight on pressing, reduced load one notch.
Long run progressed without knee discomfort.
Wind-down ritual on most nights, noticeably faster to fall asleep.
Protein target hit on all days this week.
Rest day fully off screens, felt recovered on Monday.
